steps.title: Use the since phrase
steps.content: The phrase since 1945 describes an action that began in the past and continues into the present. That time frame calls for the present perfect tense.

steps.title: Choose present perfect
steps.content: The form has collected correctly shows ongoing collection from 1945 to now. A describes only current ongoing action, B points to the future, and D states a habit without expressing the duration from 1945. The answer is C.
